content: Remote OK Senior Quality Engineer Tellent <h4><strong>About the Role</strong></h4><p>As a Senior Quality Engineer you'll own and grow the quality of Tellent HR alongside our existing QE team. You'll drive our test automation strategy, expand end-to-end coverage in Playwright, and raise the bar for backend testing. This is a hands-on collaborative role with genuine ownership, direct impact on product development and the experience of our customers.</p><p></p><h4><strong>Your 12-Month Journey</strong></h4><ul><li><p><strong>During your first 3 months:</strong> You'll get to know Tellent HR, our engineering practices, and our quality standards. You'll learn our testing framework and development workflow while gradually contributing to automated and exploratory testing.</p></li><li><p><strong>Within 6 months:</strong> You'll take ownership of quality for parts of the product, expand our Playwright test coverage and work closely with engineers to build quality into every stage of development.</p></li><li><p><strong>After 1 year:</strong> You'll be a trusted quality partner within the team, driving improvements to our testing strategy, raising the bar for automation, and helping shape how we approach quality as Tellent HR continues to grow.</p></li></ul><p></p><h4><strong>What Youâll Be Doing</strong></h4><ul><li><p>Work closely with our other QEâs to help bring our test automation strategy to life across Tellent HR, taking joint ownership and maintaining a significant part of it as it grows.</p></li><li><p>Partner with developers and fellow QEâs to embed quality early, sharing domain knowledge in both directions and shaping testing practices collaboratively.</p></li><li><p>Design and execute comprehensive test plans, test cases, and test scripts to ensure software accuracy and functionality</p></li><li><p>Develop into a product domain expert using that understanding to test, spot risks earlier and guide quality decisions across Tellent HR</p></li></ul><p></p><h4><strong>What You Bring</strong></h4><ul><li><p><strong>Strong QA experience:</strong> Several years of hands-on quality engineering, with senior-level ownership of testing for complex web applications.</p></li><li><p><strong>E2E automation:</strong> Experience building and maintaining end-to-end test suites in Playwright</p></li><li><p><strong>API &amp; backend testing skills:</strong> Proficiency testing GraphQL APIs and backend services</p></li><li><p><strong>Balance of product and technical thinking:</strong> Equally at home discussing product behaviour and digging into technical detail.</p></li><li><p><strong>Communication:</strong> Fluent English and Polish for daily collaboration.</p></li></ul><p></p><h4><strong>What We Offer</strong></h4><ul><li><p>Primarily remote working with flexibility and opportunities to connect with the team</p></li><li><p>Diverse and international team environment</p></li><li><p>Annual compensation range: 200000-225000 PLN/year (+ VAT where applicable)</p></li><li><p>Time off based on contract type:</p><ul><li><p>B2B: 30 paid break days</p></li><li><p>Employment contract: 26 paid holiday days + 2 wellbeing days</p></li></ul></li><li><p>â¬1500 annual learning budget</p></li><li><p>Wellness perks including Multisport and private healthcare (LuxMed)</p></li><li><p>Work from anywhere for up to 4 weeks per year</p></li><li><p>Apple MacBook, displays, and all the tools you need to succeed</p></li><li><p>â¬200 home office budget + work-from-home allowance</p></li></ul><p></p><h4><strong>About Tellent</strong></h4><p>Tellent is a leading Talent Management Suite designed to empower HR &amp; People teams across the entire employee journey. Our all-in-one platform combines an Applicant Tracking System (<strong>Tellent Recruitee</strong>), an intuitive HRIS (<strong>Tellent HR</strong>), and powerful Performance Management software (<strong>Tellent Grow</strong>).</p><p>With 250+ team members globally, 7,000+ customers in 100+ countries, and a growing ecosystem of 500+ partners, we help organizations attract, grow, and retain top talent â and weâre just getting started.</p><p></p><h4><strong>AI in our recruitment process</strong></h4><p>We use our internally developed AI tools to help streamline our recruitment process. However, technology never makes a decision. Every candidate is personally reviewed by our team. Your journey with us is guided by people, supported by tech. Curious about how it works? Read ourÂ <a href="https://recruitee.com/ai-statement">AI Statement</a>, check ourÂ <a href="https://recruitee.com/privacy-policy">Privacy Policy</a>, or chat with us atÂ <a href="mailto:hr@tellent.com">hr@tellent.com</a>.</p><p></p><p><em>If you require accommodations or support during the recruitment process, please let us know â weâre happy to help.</em></p><br /> Novaris Search <p>Supply Chain Director</p><p><strong>New York, USA</strong></p><p><strong>On-site / Hybrid depending on business needs</strong></p><p><br></p><p><strong>About the Company</strong></p><p>Novaris Search is partnered with a growing business within the <strong>personal care and beauty manufacturing</strong> space that is looking to appoint a <strong>Supply Chain Director</strong> to lead and strengthen its end-to-end supply chain function.</p><p><br></p><p>This is a key leadership role for a commercially aware supply chain professional who can build structure, improve performance, and support the business through its next phase of growth.</p><p><br></p><p><strong>Position Overview</strong></p><p>The Supply Chain Director will be responsible for overseeing the full supply chain operation, including <strong>planning, procurement, inventory, logistics, and cross-functional coordination</strong> across the business.</p><p><br></p><p>The successful candidate will lead efforts to improve service levels, optimise inventory, strengthen supplier performance, and ensure the supply chain function is aligned with operational and commercial objectives.</p><p><br></p><p>This role would suit someone with strong leadership skills, a hands-on approach, and experience operating in a fast-paced <strong>manufacturing environment</strong>, ideally within <strong>personal care, cosmetics, beauty, or a related category</strong>.</p><p><br
